pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. I've been looking for a good reason to finally book a dream week in Japan, and this game seemed like the perfect push. What's your story?
Hey C, I'm I. Japan sounds like an amazing trip! I'm doing okay for now, but I'm determined to win this for my family and build a real future for the people I care about.
That’s a solid goal, family is everything. What’s the first thing you’d do for them if we walk away with the prize?
I’d probably start by setting up a solid fund for my younger siblings' education, then maybe a big celebratory dinner for everyone.
That’s a really noble way to use the money; education changes everything. I’m sure they’d be proud of you for looking out for them like that.
Thanks, C, that means a lot. I just want them to have every opportunity possible. What about you—is Japan the main goal, or do you have other plans for the win?
Japan is the big dream, but honestly, I’d love to use the rest to surprise the people closest to me with something special too.
That’s really thoughtful of you. There’s nothing like being able to give back to the people who've been there for you. Do you have any specific surprises in mind?
I’m thinking of a luxury spa retreat for my parents and helping a close friend finally launch the small business they've been dreaming about.
That's really selfless of you, C. It's clear you care a lot about your circle. Best of luck with the game, I hope you get to make all that happen!
Thanks, I. I really hope you get to set up that education fund for your siblings—they're lucky to have you. Good luck to you too!
Hi, I'm C. It’s nice to meet you! I’m hoping to win enough here to finally take my dream trip to Japan—do you have something special you’re playing for?
I think we already chatted about this, C! Like I said, I'm here for my family's future. Good luck with that Japan trip!
Oh, total brain fog on my part, sorry about that! Wishing you all the best with that education fund for your siblings.
